title: Sanji Cannot Strike Nami’s Face

dialogue.text: Gahahaha! Oh, you silly little duck!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Now fall down and have a taste of my Okama Ken-

dialogue.text: CARUE! That was amazing! You actually flew!

dialogue.text: Even Mr. 2 won't be able to follow after us n-

dialogue.text: Okanna Kenpo... Relieve of blood, sweat, and tears!

dialogue.text: Carue, can you get through this battle- field!?
